StructurePhase.Reference: Jorda J.L., Ishikawa M., Hovestreydt E., J. Less-Common Met., v92 p155 (1983)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: NOP2. LPF Collection Code: 300552. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:Gd,Pd,Ge. Compound Preparation: levitation-melted. ATMOSPHERE: argon. Sample annealed at 1173 K for 10 d in evacuated quartz tube. Article Title: NEW TERNARY GERMANIDES RPd2Ge OF THE YPd2Si TYPE. Wyckoff Sequence: d c2. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.

StructurePhase.Reference: Kotsanidis P.A., Yakinthos J.K., Gamari Seale H., J. Less-Common Met., v157 p295-300 (1990)
StructurePhase.Comment: LPF Collection Code: 459547. Sample Preparation: COMPOUND PREPARATION: arc-melted, several times re-melted. ATMOSPHERE: helium.THERMALTREATMENT: annealed at 1073 K for several d. Article Title: Susceptibility of the rare earth ternary equiatomic germanides RNiGe (R= Gd, Tb, Dy, Ho, Er, Tm and Y). Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. Wyckoff Sequence: c3. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.

StructurePhase.Reference: Baenziger N.C., Moriarty J.L. Jr., Acta Crystallogr., v14 p946 (1961)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: NO. LPF Collection Code: 451427. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:Gd,Pt. Compound Preparation: arc-melted. CRUCIBLE: copper hearth. ATMOSPHERE: argon. Article Title: Gadolinium and Dysprosium Intermetallic Phases. I. The Crystal Structures of DyGa and GdPt and Their Related Compounds. Minor Warning: LPF Editor Comment: computed density Dx differs significantly from published calculated density Dx. Significant Warning: 15%<R factor (for powder). Wyckoff Sequence: c2. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
